tools.name: general.postChangeStatus
tools.description: Changes the status of the provided payment method to the specified status.

tools.name: general.postCheckBalance
tools.description: Checks the balance of the provided payment method.

tools.name: general.postIssue
tools.description: Issues a new card of the given payment method.

tools.name: general.postLoad
tools.description: Loads the payment method with the specified funds.

tools.name: general.postMergeBalance
tools.description: Increases the balance of the paymentmethod by the full amount left on the source paymentmethod

tools.name: general.postVoidTransaction
tools.description: Voids the referenced stored value transaction.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
